title: 1x Round Silicone Baking Tray Air Fryer Liner - Black - Greaseproof Parchment Airfryer Tower Drawer Basket Inserts Accessories Sheets - By Ashley
features: This 120g food grade silicone material is non-toxic, durable & wear resistant, environmentally friendly & economical.
It will protect the inside of your air fryer & the handles allow the food to be easily removed with no scorching.
Simple to wash & reuse, it can be used in temperatures up to 230°C in your air fryer, plus microwave, oven, steamer & for presenting food.
